allow: Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const data = JSON.parse\(chunks.join\(''\)\); const items = \(data.items || []\).slice\(0, 3\); items.forEach\(\(item, i\) => { console.log\('--- webhook', i, '---'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(item.payload, null, 2\).slice\(0, 600\)\); }\); }\); ")

Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const data = JSON.parse\(chunks.join\(''\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(data.items.slice\(0, 8\), null, 2\)\); }\); ")

Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const data = JSON.parse\(chunks.join\(''\)\); const chats = data.chats || []; if \(chats.length === 0\) { console.log\('No hay chats'\); return; } const chat = chats[0]; console.log\('Chat:', chat.chatId\); console.log\('Mensajes:'\); \(chat.messages || []\).forEach\(m => { console.log\(JSON.stringify\({ id: \(m.id||''\).slice\(0,20\), text: \(m.text||''\).slice\(0,40\), dir: m.direction, status: m.deliveryStatus }\)\); }\); }\); ")

Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const data = JSON.parse\(chunks.join\(''\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(data.items, null, 2\)\); }\); ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) items = data.get\('items', []\)[:15] for item in items: t = item.get\('type', '?'\) ts = item.get\('receivedAt', 0\) extra = '' if t == 'handoff_request': extra = ' return_url=' + item.get\('body', {}\).get\('return_url', ''\)[-30:] elif t == 'handoff_response_prepared': extra = ' reply_text=' + str\(item.get\('responsePayload', {}\).get\('data', {}\).get\('reply_text', ''\)\)[:30] elif t == 'handoff_complete': extra = ' delivered=' + str\(item.get\('delivered'\)\) print\(f'{ts} {t}{extra}'\) ")
